title: AutoSow
description: AutoSow automatically replants crops when harvested, making farming more efficient and enjoyable. Compatible with all vanilla crops and works with any tool or bare hands.
body:
[![Lightarue Hosting Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1210744/description_45293afd-81c5-4e69-aff0-25c907050440.png)](https://dathost.net/r/osama/minecraft-server-hosting)



AutoSow is a lightweight yet powerful utility mod that revolutionizes crop harvesting in Minecraft. It automatically replants crops the moment you harvest them, streamlining your farming experience.

Key Features:
✦ Instant Replanting: Crops are automatically replanted immediately after harvesting
✦ Universal Tool Support: Works with any tool or bare hands
✦ Smart Seed Management: Efficiently uses seeds from your inventory
✦ Vanilla Crop Support: Compatible with wheat, carrots, potatoes, and beetroots
✦ User-Friendly: No complex configuration needed - just install and start farming
✦ Performance Friendly: Optimized code ensures minimal impact on game performance
✦ Configurable: Each crop type can be individually enabled/disabled

How It Works:
Simply break fully grown crops as you normally would. If you have seeds in your inventory, the mod will automatically use one to replant the crop. Works in both creative and survival modes!



📞 Support
Need assistance or have suggestions? Contact @5sam_h
